title: Cortex Package Graph
subtitle: Six packages, their dependencies, and current build state
purpose: Shows the v0.5.0 package layout and dependency direction. NOTE: cortex-config was merged into cortex-core (src/config/) on 2026-05-19. cortex-provider-sqlite-vec was added 2026-05-20 (vector). cortex-provider-llm-claude-code was added 2026-05-21 (LLM, subprocess transport per ADR 012).

packages.role: Base — Zod schemas, provider interfaces, Logger, QueryResult envelope, ARP scopes

v0_1_progress.T4_data_model_schemas: complete (22 tests at v0.1; grown via ADRs 004–007 to include ProfileEntry, MemoryStatus, isLatest/supersededBy on Memory + Fact, Contradiction.rationale)
v0_1_progress.T5_interfaces_envelopes: complete (15 additional tests at v0.1; StructuredStore grown via ADRs 002/005/006/007: +deleteEntity, +updateMemory, +markFactSuperseded, +markMemorySuperseded)

packages.role: Kernel — createCortex() factory + ingest/retrieve/maintain/access zones + config loader (cortex-config merged in 2026-05-19) + getEntityProfile + factRetrieval implementations
packages.config_merge_note: cortex-config package DELETED on 2026-05-19. loadConfig/getDefaultConfig/ENV_MAP/ConfigSchema all now export from @kybernesis/cortex-core (src/config/). This reduces the package graph from 5 to 4.

v0_1_progress.T6_load_config: merged in — three-layer loader (defaults → file → env), 28 config tests, deep-frozen result, 7 nested sections with locked-in defaults from arcana-spec.md §11
v0_1_progress.T7_skeleton_zones: complete (zones throw NotImplementedError; SLEEP_STEPS const; access/bindings/ placeholder)
v0_1_progress.T8_createCortex_factory: complete (.providers frozen; logger defaults to createNoopLogger(); scheduler/queue fallback stubs; vector is now optional — createMissingVectorStore() fallback added same pattern as scheduler/queue)
v0_1_progress.T11_getEntityProfile: implemented (commit 7bb12c4) — assembles from live facts/insights/neighbors; stores result; returns from storage on second call; QueryResult envelope
v0_1_progress.T12_factRetrieval: implemented (commit 7bb12c4) — structured-only text-match; scores by word-hit ratio; annotates with why field; hybridSearch path deferred until sqlite-vec + FTS5 ready

packages.role: In-memory fake providers for consumer integration tests (compliance harness deferred until second real provider)
packages.note: 4 fake providers shipped (StructuredStore, VectorStore, EmbeddingProvider, LLMProvider). FakeStructuredStore updated with throw-on-unknown-id semantics for markMemorySuperseded. Compliance harness runComplianceSuite() deferred until cortex-provider-sqlite-vec or Convex provider joins libsql.

packages.role: Full StructuredStore implementation over libsql (same sync SQLite binding as KyberBot). All 9 entity types. In-memory integration tests. mkdirSync fix for file-path databases (DVR-EC-001). Unblocks KyberBot wiring initCortex().
bug_fixes: DVR-EC-001: connect() now mkdirSync(parent, {recursive:true}) before opening a file-path database, so the provider works when the data directory does not yet exist

packages.role: VectorStore over sqlite-vec (no Docker, :memory: support). vec0 virtual table with rowid_ref companion pattern. Unblocks hybridSearch and enables ChromaDB removal from KyberBot.
packages.note: VectorStore via vec0 virtual table; rowid_ref companion pattern; :memory: testing; 11 tests. Added in v0.1.1 — was planned_packages in v0.1.0 data.

packages.role: LLMProvider via Claude Code CLI subprocess (claude -p). No API key — uses local subscription. Faithful port of KyberBot claude.ts → completeSubprocess per ADR 011. First concrete LLMProvider impl, unblocks the sleep pipeline.
packages.note: Subprocess transport per ADR 012. Sibling package cortex-provider-llm-http (multi-backend HTTP: Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini/Ollama/OpenRouter) is queued, separate sprint.
